title: sesleria autumnalis subsp. argentea
intro: Sesleria autumnalis subsp. argentea, also known as Autumn Silver Hairgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Sesleria autumnalis subsp. argentea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and promote healing of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
